title: Liquid chromatography mass spectrometry data of HMCES SRAP domain
author: Halabelian, Levon
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Liquid chromatography mass spectrometry data for the HMCES SRAP domain alone (Apo_SRAPd) and for the SRAP domain incubated with abasic site containing DNA (SRAPd_DPC). All LC/MS data were acquired according to the previously published protocol (Chalk R., Springer New York, 2017).
steps_raw: Liquid chromatography mass spectrometry data for the HMCES SRAP domain alone (Apo_SRAPd) and for the SRAP domain incubated with abasic site containing DNA (SRAPd_DPC). All LC/MS data were acquired according to the previously published protocol (Chalk R., Springer New York, 2017).
